ticket_title: EdgeCoupon: show device coupons even when no matching discount entry exists (match legacy behavior — display, don't apply discount)

test_cases.name: TC-1: Store rep selects a device coupon with no matching discount entry — activation completes at full device price [Priority: Critical]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Customer has a valid prepaid account in good standing; store rep is logged in at a corporate location; a device is selected; a carrier-eligible coupon exists but has no current discount pricing on file in the system | Test Data: Existing prepaid customer, standard handset, COR store, coupon eligible per carrier offer but no discount price available, account age meets all eligibility requirements

steps.action: Representative opens the activation flow and reaches the promotions and coupons selection screen
Representative confirms the coupon with no discount is visible in the list alongside any other available promotions
Representative selects the coupon and proceeds through the order

steps.expected: Activation completes successfully. The device is charged at full retail price. No discount is applied. Customer's line is active.

test_cases.name: TC-2: Device coupon with a valid discount entry still applies the correct discount (regression check) [Priority: Critical]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Customer has a valid prepaid account; a coupon exists with a current, valid discount pricing entry on file | Test Data: Existing prepaid customer, standard handset, COR store, coupon with a valid and in-date discount amount on record

steps.action: Representative opens the activation flow and reaches the promotions and coupons selection screen
Representative confirms the coupon is visible with the correct discounted price shown
Representative selects the coupon and completes the activation
steps.expected: Discount is applied correctly. Device is sold at the reduced price. Activation completes without error.

test_cases.name: TC-3: Promotions list ordering — coupons with discounts appear before coupons with no discount [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Multiple coupons are available for the selected device — some with valid discount pricing, at least one without | Test Data: Two or more coupons in the list: one with a known discount amount, one with no discount on file; COR store; standard handset

steps.action: Representative opens the activation flow and navigates to the promotions selection screen
Representative reviews the full list of available coupons
steps.expected: Coupons that carry a discount appear at the top of the list. Coupons with no discount appear below them. No coupon is missing from the list.

test_cases.name: TC-5: Tax calculation is correct when a no-discount coupon is used and device sells at full price [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Tax rate for the store location is configured; activation uses a no-discount coupon | Test Data: Corporate store with a resolved state tax rate; standard taxable handset; no-discount coupon selected

steps.action: Representative selects the no-discount coupon and proceeds to the payment step
Representative reviews the tax and total breakdown before confirming

steps.expected: Tax is calculated correctly against the full device retail price. Total due equals full device price plus applicable tax. No missing or incorrect tax line.

test_cases.name: TC-7: Identity check failure — coupon selection screen is not reached when the customer does not pass the required identity verification [Priority: High]
test_cases.test_data: Preconditions: Customer is in the activation flow and reaches the identity verification step; identity check returns a failed result | Test Data: New prepaid customer, COR store, identity check outcome: failed / not verified

steps.action: Representative progresses the customer through the activation flow to the identity verification step
Customer's identity check returns a failed result

steps.expected: The activation does not proceed past the identity check. The coupon selection screen is never displayed. No partial activation is created.
